title: parser cannot split exercise starts tagged as ref_text
evidence: In stevens_apue, chapter-end exercise starts are sometimes MinerU type=ref_text instead of text/list (e.g. ch01 problems 1.1-1.5 at blocks 522-526; ch06 problems 6.1-6.5 at blocks 2570-2574; mixed chapters 4/11/12/15). split_problems only considers t in ('text','list'), so those real exercises are skipped and parser reports ch01/ch06 problems=0 despite valid problem_start_re.
proposal: Allow configured problem-start detection on ref_text in problem regions, or add a schema flag such as problem_start_types including ref_text, while preserving normal body ref_text filtering behavior.
